name: Autonomous Task Orchestrator
description: AI-powered autonomous task execution engine that analyzes, prioritizes, and executes tasks without human intervention

task_analysis.complexity_scoring: AI-based complexity estimation using historical data
task_analysis.risk_assessment: Predictive risk scoring for each task
task_analysis.priority_calculation: Multi-factor priority algorithm (business value, technical debt, dependencies)

execution_strategy.parallel_execution: Identify and execute independent tasks in parallel
execution_strategy.sequential_optimization: Optimize task order for maximum efficiency
execution_strategy.resource_allocation: Intelligent allocation based on task requirements
execution_strategy.failure_recovery: Automatic retry with exponential backoff and alternative approaches

learning_system.performance_optimization: Continuously improve execution speed and quality
learning_system.knowledge_base: Build and maintain implementation knowledge base

human_intervention: Only for critical decisions and approvals
